MINUTES FOR APR-02-2024 9:30 AM

ASBESTOS LAW AND MOTION ON APR-02-2024 IN DEPT. 301, PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FOR ORDER GRANTING PREFERENCE IN SETTING CASE FOR TRIAL, AND EXTENDING DISCOVERY CUTOFF IS GRANTED UNDER CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE SECTION 36(A). THE TRIAL DATE IS JULY 22, 2024 AT 11:15 A.M. IN DEPARTMENT 206. LAST DAY PURSUANT TO C.C.P. SECTION 36(F) IS JULY 30, 2024. THE LAST DAY FOR HEARING SUMMARY JUDGMENT/ADJUDICATION MOTIONS IS JULY 16, 2024. CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS SET FOR JUNE 4, 2024 AT 1:30 P.M. IN DEPT. 301. MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE IS SET FOR THURSDAY, JULY 18, 2024, AT 9:30 A.M. IN DEPARTMENT 503. PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER IN WORD FORMAT TRACKING THE COURT'S RULING TO DEPARTMENT301@SFTC.ORG [SEE WORD MINUTES FOR DETAILS]. JUDGE: ROCHELLE C. EAST; CLERK: S. LE; PROCEEDINGS NOT REPORTED. (301)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Granting Preference In Setting Case For Trial, And Extending Discovery Cutoff
Off Calendar Apr-02-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES Via CourtCall:
Kimberly J. Chu of BRAYTON & PURCELL LLP (415-898-1555), appearing for plaintiff James E. Saunders, II.
Laura Przetak of SPANOS | PRZETAK (510-250-0200), Designated Defense Counsel.
Robert J. Bugatto of HUGO & PARKER (415-808-0300), appearing for defendant Foster Wheeler.

RULING:
Hearing held, ARGUED. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PLAINTIFF JAMES SAUNDERS' Motion For Order Granting Preference In Setting Case For Trial, And Extending Discovery Cutoff is GRANTED under C.C.P. section 36(a).

[see word minutes for details]

Plaintiff's counsel to submit proposed order in WORD format to department301@sftc.org

Judge: Rochelle C. East; Clerk: S. Le; Proceedings not reported. (301)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Granting Preference In Setting Case For Trial, And Extending Discovery Cutoff
Off Calendar Mar-26-2024 Continued To Apr-02-24 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 301
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Kimberly Chu, Esq. of Brayton Purcell, appearing via CourtCall for Plaintiff James Saunders II;
Hillary Huth, Esq. of Spanos Preztak, Designated Defense Counsel, appearing in person;
Daniel B. Hoye of Husch Blackwell LLC (510-768-0629), appearing via CourtCall for defendant Metalclad Insulation, LLC;
Alexandra Sologub of WFBM, LLP (714-634-2522), appearing via CourtCall for defendants General Electric Company and Paramount Global;
Ramon Flores, Esq. of Bassi Edlin Huie & Blum (213-412-2662), appearing via CourtCall for defendant Parker-Hannifin Corporation.

Hearing re: Plaintiff James Saunders' Motion For Order Granting Preference In Setting Case For Trial, And Extending Discovery Cutoff.

The matter is contested. Ms. Chu argues on behalf of Plaintiff James E. Saunders II.

At the conclusion of argument, the Court vacates the tentative ruling and continues Plaintiff James Saunders' Motion For Order Granting Preference In Setting Case For Trial, And Extending Discovery Cutoff to April 2, 2024, at 9:30 a.m. in Dept. 301. Ms. Chu is to submit the requested proofs of service to Department 301.

Due to the continuance, Ms. Chu requests that the Court consider using today's date as the 120th day factor.

Judge: Rochelle C. East. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Deputy: Not Present. Matter not reported. (301/RCE)
